title: Small balls covered of Ziba’s whit Taqueritos
ingredients: 1 Chips Creams and Spices crushed from Ziba’s bag
instructions: Paso 1. In a bowl, mix the cream cheese with the cheddar cheese, garlic salt, bacon, chives and paprika.
Paso 2. Shape this mixture into balls and cover with the crushed Ziba’s.
Paso 3. Place the balls on a tray and let them cool for 1 hour.
Paso 4. Before serving, place a Taquerito in the middle of each ball and serve.
